title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Nexus Select Trust

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Nexus Select Trust
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Nexus Select Trust in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Nexus Select Trust:
Nexus Select Trust is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nexus Select Trust!
